description: The Papalia crime family is a 'Ndrangheta organized crime family based in Hamilton, Ontario, Canada, founded by Antonio Papalia in the 1940s. It is one of three centralized Mafia organizations in Hamilton, with strong connections to the Buffalo crime family. The family was decimated after the killings of boss Johnny Papalia and his lieutenant in 1997, ordered by the Musitano family. The last leader, Frank Papalia, died in 2014.
